name: Tidal Secrets
description: A small coastal fishing village holds dark secrets beneath its peaceful surface. A mysterious prisoner, a loyal guard, and ordinary folk caught between duty and conscience.

preview_npcs.name: Mira
preview_npcs.description: A sharp-eyed girl of about 14 who has survived on her wits since childhood. She's formed a quiet bond with the prisoner nobody else will speak to.

preview_npcs.name: Old Caspian
preview_npcs.description: Weathered and wise, Caspian has watched the kingdom tighten its grip over forty years of tides. He knows more than he lets on.

preview_npcs.name: Edda
preview_npcs.description: Sharp-tongued and quietly fierce, Edda is the moral compass of the household. She sees through people instantly.

preview_npcs.name: Sergeant Hollis
preview_npcs.description: A loyal soldier whose certainty is beginning to crack. He follows orders, but the prisoner makes him uneasy.

preview_npcs.name: Dorin
preview_npcs.description: A former royal cartographer in shackles. Calm, resigned — and carrying a secret about the kingdom that could change everything.
